prompt: Three Shapes Center Bounce. White background. Circle (140px red #F44336), square (140px blue #2196F3), triangle (140px base green #4CAF50). Animation (6s): 0-2s: Circle slides from left, square from right, triangle drops from top. All arrive at center with bounce (overshoot 15px, settle). 2-4s: All three rotate slowly in place (each 180°). 4-5s: All scale together: 100% -> 110% -> 100%. 5-6s: Fade out together. Total duration: 6s. [cite: 374, 375, 376, 377, 378]

Shapes Horizontal Align Pulse. Gradient background (#E3F2FD to #BBDEFB). Circle (120px), square (120px), triangle (120px base), all magenta (#E91E63). Animation (8s): 0-2s: Circle slides in from left, square from right, triangle drops from top, all stop at center overlapping. 2-4s: Shapes slowly rotate in place. Circle moves 40px up, square 40px down, triangle shifts between them. 4-6s: All move toward exact center, overlap increases, opacity lowers where overlapping (blend mode). 6-8s: Align horizontally (150px apart), pulse scale 100% -> 105% -> 100%, fade out. [cite_start]Total duration: 8s. [cite: 379, 380, 381, 382, 383, 384]

Sequential Shape Reveal. Dark background (#212121). Five circles (each 100px), arranged in horizontal row (120px spacing), different colors: red, orange, yellow, green, blue. Animation (7s): 0-1.4s: Circle 1 (red) fades in. 1.4-2.8s: Circle 2 (orange) fades in. 2.8-4.2s: Circle 3 (yellow) fades in. 4.2-5.6s: Circle 4 (green) fades in. 5.6-7s: Circle 5 (blue) fades in, all hold. [cite_start]Total duration: 7s. [cite: 385, 386, 387, 388]

Bar Chart Three Bars. Light grey background. Three vertical bars (rectangles): 80px wide each, 150px apart horizontally, all start at bottom (y: 80% canvas height), same base level. Colors: bar 1 blue (#1976D2), bar 2 orange (#F57C00), bar 3 green (#388E3C). Animation (6s): 0-2s: Bar 1 grows upward from 0px to 200px height (30% target). 2-4s: Bar 2 grows from 0px to 280px (40%). 4-6s: Bar 3 grows from 0px to 360px (50%). All bars have rounded top corners (10px radius). [cite_start]Total duration: 6s. [cite: 389, 390, 391, 392, 393, 394]

Bar Chart with Counter. White background. Three bars same as prompt 104, same positions and colors. Above each bar position: percentage text ('0%' initially, white on dark grey badge 60px x 30px, rounded). Animation (7s): 0-2s: Bar 1 grows to 200px, simultaneously text counts '0%' -> '30%' above it. 2-4s: Bar 2 grows to 280px, text counts '0%' -> '40%'. 4-6s: Bar 3 grows to 360px, text counts '0%' -> '50%'. 6-7s: All hold complete. [cite_start]Total duration: 7s. [cite: 395, 396, 397, 398, 399, 400]

Circles Orbit Center. Black background. Center: Small white circle (40px, stationary). Orbiting: Three colored circles (each 60px): red, green, blue. Each on invisible circular orbit (radius 180px from center). Animation (8s): 0-2s: Center circle appears, orbit circles appear at top, right-bottom, left-bottom positions (120° apart). 2-8s: All three circles orbit clockwise around center simultaneously, maintaining 120° spacing. Complete 1 full orbit over 6s. [cite_start]Total duration: 8s. [cite: 401, 402, 403, 404, 405]

Square Grid Appear Sequential. White background. 3x3 grid of squares (9 total), each 80px, 20px gaps, purple (#9C27B0), centered grid. Animation (9s): Squares appear sequentially in pattern: top-left -> top-center -> top-right -> middle-left -> center -> middle-right -> bottom-left -> bottom-center -> bottom-right. Each square fades in over 0.8s with 0.2s stagger (total 8s for all 9). All hold 1s. [cite_start]Total duration: 9s. [cite: 406, 407, 408, 409, 410]

Triangles Point Inward. Gradient background. Four triangles (each 140px base, red #E53935): top triangle pointing down, bottom pointing up, left pointing right, right pointing left. Positioned at canvas edges pointing toward center. Animation (7s): 0-2s: All four triangles slide in from their edges toward center. 2-4s: Stop 100px from center, rotate slowly (each 180°). 4-6s: Move closer to center (50px from center), opacity lowers to 60%. 6-7s: All pulse scale 100% -> 110% -> 100%. [cite_start]Total duration: 7s. [cite: 411, 412, 413, 414, 415]

Line Star Burst. Black background. Center point. Eight lines (each 200px long, 3px thick, white), radiating from center like star burst (45° apart, forming 8 directions). Animation (6s): 0-4s: Lines draw outward from center sequentially clockwise: line 1 (top) over 0.5s, line 2 (top-right) over 0.5s, continuing for all 8 lines. 4-6s: All complete lines rotate together 45° clockwise. [cite_start]Total duration: 6s. [cite: 416, 417, 418, 419]

Rectangles Layered Slide. Light background. Five rectangles (each 300px x 150px, rounded 12px, same size), different colors: red, orange, yellow, green, blue. Stacked at center with 10px vertical offset creating 3D layers. Animation (8s): 0-1.6s: Red slides in from left. 1.6-3.2s: Orange slides in from left, layers on red. 3.2-4.8s: Yellow slides in. 4.8-6.4s: Green slides in. 6.4-8s: Blue slides in. All layer creating colored stack. [cite_start]Total duration: 8s. [cite: 420, 421, 422, 423, 424]

Circle Chain Connected. White background. Five circles (each 100px, blue #2196F3), arranged horizontally (140px apart). Lines (3px, grey) connect adjacent circles (center to center). Animation (7s): 0-1.4s: Circle 1 appears, no line. 1.4-2.8s: Line draws from circle 1 to position 2, then circle 2 appears. 2.8-4.2s: Line draws 2->3, circle 3 appears. 4.2-5.6s: Line draws 3->4, circle 4 appears. 5.6-7s: Line draws 4->5, circle 5 appears. Shapes Size Progression. Grey background. Five circles arranged horizontally (150px spacing), all centered vertically. Sizes increase: 60px, 90px, 120px, 150px, 180px. All cyan (#00BCD4). Animation (6s): All appear simultaneously (fade in 1s). Then scale pulse wave left to right: circle 1 pulses 100% -> 115% -> 100% (0.8s), then circle 2 (0.8s), continuing through all 5 (total 4s pulse wave). Final 1s hold. [cite_start]Total duration: 6s. Triangle Spinning Formation. Black background. Three triangles (each 120px, different colors: red, green, blue), start at center overlapping. Square Border Sequential Build. White background. Four rectangles forming square border frame: top bar (400px x 40px), bottom bar (400px x 40px), left bar (40px x 300px), right bar (40px x 300px). Animation (6s): 0-1.5s: Top bar draws left to right. 1.5-3s: Right bar draws top to bottom. 3-4.5s: Bottom bar draws right to left. 4.5-6s: Left bar draws bottom to top, completing square border. Circles Merge Split. Light background. Two circles: red (#F44336, 120px) and blue (#2196F3, 120px). Start separated 200px apart horizontally. Pentagon Ring Rotate. Dark background. Five pentagons (each 100px, same size), different colors (red, orange, yellow, green, blue), arranged in circle (radius 180px from center), evenly spaced. Bar Graph Comparison. White background. Two groups of bars side by side. Left group (labeled 'BEFORE'): 3 bars (60px wide, grey #9E9E9E), heights 120px, 160px, 100px. Right group (labeled 'AFTER'): 3 bars (60px wide, green #4CAF50), heights 200px, 280px, 180px. Labels: small text above each group. Staggered Timing Variation. Gradient background. Five squares (each 100px), arranged diagonally, colors: red, orange, yellow, green, blue. Circles Shadow Depth. Light grey background. Three circles (each 150px, white #FFFFFF), arranged vertically (180px apart). Circle 3 (bottom): shadow 0px 24px 48px (highest). Animation (6s): 0-2s: All appear with shadows. 2-4s: Shadows animate: top shadow grows to match middle, middle to match bottom, bottom shrinks to match original top (circular shadow rotation). 4-6s: Return to original depths. Lines Form Grid. White background. Grid formation: 5 horizontal lines (each 400px x 2px, grey #757575, 80px vertical spacing) and 5 vertical lines (each 2px x 400px, same grey, 80px horizontal spacing) forming 4x4 grid. Animation (8s): 0-4s: Horizontal lines draw from left to right sequentially (0.8s each). 4-8s: Vertical lines draw from top to bottom sequentially (0.8s each), completing grid. Shapes Gradient Overlap. Black background. Pulse Wave Through Row. Light background. Six circles (each 80px, blue #1E88E5), horizontal row (100px spacing). Triangle Stack Pyramid. White background. Six triangles (each 140px base, yellow #FDD835), arranged in pyramid: row 1 (bottom): 3 triangles. Row 2 (middle): 2 triangles. Row 3 (top): 1 triangle. Color Cycling Coordination. Black background. Four squares (each 120px), arranged in 2x2 grid (40px gaps). All start red (#F44336). Opacity Fade Pattern. Light background. 4x4 grid of circles (16 total), each 60px, all cyan (#00BCD4), 20px gaps. Rotation Direction Contrast. White background. Two circles (each 160px): left circle red (#E53935) with small white dot showing rotation, right circle blue (#1E88E5) with white dot. Scale Coordination Inverse. Grey background. Two squares (each 140px), left orange (#FF9800), right purple (#9C27B0), 200px apart. Line Star Formation. Black background. Center point. Twelve lines (each 250px long, 2px thick, white), radiating from center at 30° intervals (forming 12-point star burst). Circles Radial Expand. White background. Center: small circle (40px, red #F44336). Sequential Color Fill. Black background. Five outlined rectangles (each 200px x 150px, 3px white stroke, no fill), arranged horizontally (40px gaps). Triangle Wave Motion. Gradient background. Six triangles (each 100px base, all pointing up, cyan #00BCD4), arranged in horizontal row (120px spacing). Squares Perspective Depth. Light grey background. Five squares (each starts 150px), same red color, arranged diagonally from top-left to bottom-right. Triangles Mirror Symmetry. Grey background. Two triangles (each 160px base): left triangle points right (green #43A047), right triangle points left (orange #FF9800), 200px apart, centered vertically. Rectangles Interlock. White background. Two rectangles: horizontal (300px x 80px, blue #1976D2) and vertical (80px x 300px, red #E53935).
